title.en: Ye Tian intercepted the Ice Sun Realm God.

content.en:
Wow!

Ye Tian intercepted the Ice Sun Realm God.

And the Ice Sun Realm God didn't know Ye Tian, he only thought that Ye Tian was a primary-level powerhouse of the Eternal Realm God Realm of a certain big force, so he said: "Your Excellency is the Realm God of which force? Could it be that you want to occupy this Eternal Country? This Eternal Realm is already the territory of our Old Sun Mountain!"

The site of the old mountains?

Ye Tian was stunned, ~ Why didn't he know?

But soon, he knew what was going on - what was going on.

There is no doubt that this Old Sun Mountain has taken a fancy to the Terran Holy Country and wants to let the Terran Holy Country take refuge in the Old Sun Mountain, and the Ice Sun Realm God regards him as a certain Eternal Realm God Realm beginner powerhouse who has come to grab territory, so he said so.

"Ice Sun Realm God, you don't even know who I am, I am the lord of this Terran Holy Country, how come I don't know that the Terran Holy Country has taken refuge in the Old Sun Mountain?" Ye Tian said coldly.

"You are the ruler of this eternal kingdom????"

The Ice Sun Realm God was shocked.

It is too rare for an Eternal Realm God Realm beginner powerhouse to relocate his Eternal Realm to the Realm God Realm!

He remembered that almost all of the Eternal Realm God Realm junior powerhouses in the Eternal Realm were sent down from the Realm God Realm!

With the cultivation environment, resources, and inheritance of the Eternal Realm, it would be too difficult for an ordinary Eternal Realm Divine Realm to break through to the initial level of the Eternal Realm Divine Realm and condense the Eternal Realm Spirit!

Although it was a misunderstanding, the Ice Sun Realm God was not embarrassed, but continued: "It turned out to be the Lord of the Terran Holy Country, I am the Ice Sun Realm God from the Old Sun Mountain, Your Excellency can call me by name, you should know some about our Old Sun Mountain." The strength of our old mountains is still very strong, and if the holy kingdom of the human race takes refuge in our old mountains, they can get the blessing of our old mountains. The Realm Court will not protect the Terran Holy Kingdom, but we will. Therefore, there are still many benefits to joining a force. "

"In addition, we also have an Eternal Spirit Inheritance in the Old Sun Mountain, as long as you make significant contributions in the future, you can obtain the Eternal Spirit Inheritance and treasures that help increase the chance of condensing the Eternal Realm Spirit. "

The Ice Sun Realm God said one tempting condition after another, but these conditions he said couldn't attract Ye Tian at all.

"Old Rishan, I've heard of it, I only know that it is a medium force, and even a mere middle force dares to come and subdue our Terran Holy Country?

Ye Tian expelled the way.

When the Ice Sun Realm God heard Ye Tian's words, he was immediately extremely annoyed, but he didn't make a move.

He could sense that Ye Tian was very likely to have condensed two Eternal Realm Spirits, and he had only condensed one Eternal Realm Spirit, so there was a high probability that he would not be able to defeat Ye Tian, so there was no need to provoke Ye Tian.

After returning to the Old Day Mountain, I will discuss with several other Eternal Realm God Realm beginner powerhouses before discussing how to deal with the affairs of the Terran Holy Kingdom.

Subsequently.

He just left the place.

......

"Don't worry about the old mountains!"

Ye Tian didn't feel that he had offended the Old Sun Mountain at all, the Old Sun Mountain didn't even have a middle-level powerhouse in the Eternal Realm God Realm, he could sweep it away with his own strength.

It's okay if the old mountain doesn't come to provoke him, if he comes to provoke him, he will definitely not let go of the old mountain.

Soon after.

The Ice Sun Realm God returned to the Old Sun Mountain, and his anger was evident in the tyrannical aura along the way.

Soon, the other Realm Gods arrived one after another and asked what had happened to the Ice Sun Realm Gods.

"Ice Sun Realm God, what's going on?"

The leader of the Old Sun Mountain, the god of the Old Sun Realm, asked.

The Old Sun Realm God is the most powerful Eternal Realm God Realm beginner powerhouse in the Old Sun Mountain, condensing three Eternal Realm Spirits, and is only one step away from the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm, but this step is extremely difficult.

He attacked the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm four times in total, and failed all four times, and each time he failed, the Eternal Dao Seed was extremely weak, and once he was almost seized by the enemy, and even caused the old mountain to face a crisis.

So since then, he hasn't attacked the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm again.

As long as he doesn't encounter a middle-level powerhouse in the Eternal Realm God Realm, he is not afraid of the other party.

"The old leader, I met the lord of the Terran Holy Country, and the other party turned out to be a beginner-level powerhouse of the Eternal Realm God Realm, suspected of condensing two Eternal Realm spirits, and completely ignoring our Old Sun Mountain, and even mocking our Old Sun Mountain as a medium force, let me go!" said the Ice Sun Realm God angrily.

"Ice Sun Realm God, you're not exaggerating, are you?" asked the Old Sun Realm God.

"It's not an exaggeration!" the Ice Sun Realm God shook his head, "That's what the other party said, Old Leader, if you don't believe it, you can send another Realm God over!"

"I believe in you!"

Said the god of the old day.

"So what to do now?" asked the other realm god.

The Old Sun Realm God pondered for a while and said, "The Terran Holy Kingdom is too close to us, we must let the Terran Holy Kingdom surrender to us, even if we can't, we have to develop our power into the Terran Holy Country, and control the Terran Holy Kingdom in another way." "

Subsequently, he asked the Ice Sun Realm God and another Xuanchuan Realm God who had condensed two Eternal Realm Spirits to go to the Terran Holy Kingdom with six ordinary Eternal Realm Gods, and then negotiate with Ye Tian, if Ye Tian did not agree again, they would let a large number of Eternal Dao Realms pour into the Terran Holy Kingdom to do business, and block the surroundings of the Terran Holy Country to prevent the Eternal Dao Realms of the Terran Holy Kingdom from coming out.

In this way, the lifeblood of the Terran Holy Kingdom is in the hands of the Old Mountain.

When the time comes, they can casually cause trouble, and even lure some Terran Eternal Dao Realm to join other Eternal Realms step by step, thus making the Terran Saint Kingdom collapse automatically.

Soon.

A group of Eternal Realm Divine Realms from the Old Sun Mountain came to the Terran Holy Kingdom again, but before they could go to the national capital, they were driven away by Ye Tian.

This time, the gods of the Old Sun Realm were also angry.

"Carry out that plan and invade the Terran Holy Kingdom in another way!!!"

The Old Sun God commanded.

......

The holy country of the human race, the capital of the country.

Lin Lei came to report the situation, this time Ye Xingchen, Ye Xingyue and the others did not come to the realm of the god realm, and the entire human race holy kingdom was also an eternal realm god realm.

After all, Ye Tian had also initially come to the realm of the Realm God Realm, and he had not yet gained a firm foothold, so he naturally would not let his relatives come over.

But Lin Lei, a half-step Eternal Realm God Realm, has come over, and is responsible for handling some trivial matters of the Terran Holy Kingdom.

"Lord Ye Tian, a group of Eternal Dao Realm has entered the Terran Holy Country, doing business everywhere, and has a great impact on our Terran Holy Country. And we found that the territory around the Terran Holy Kingdom was blocked. Lin Lei reported.

"It seems that this is the plan of the old days, but it's a pity that these bells and whistles are useless!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

He is going to break into the old mountain directly, and let the old mountain know who is the boss in this area! .
